name: Lead Sourcing Workflow
description: Automated lead sourcing from Apollo.io or manual CSV → enrichment → qualification → deduplication → Leads tab. Supports swimwear brands and B2B companies.

values.name: summary
values.value: ={{ $json.leads.length }} leads processed. {{ $json.leads.filter(l => l.qualified && !l.is_duplicate).length }} qualified & new. {{ $json.leads.filter(l => !l.qualified).length }} disqualified. {{ $json.leads.filter(l => l.is_duplicate).length }} duplicates skipped.
